title: calycera crassifolia var. spinulosa
intro: Calycera crassifolia var. spinulosa, also known as the prickly Calycera, is a plant species within the Calyceraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids in its roots and leaves. The medicinal properties of Calycera crassifolia var. spinulosa have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, offering health benefits such as reduced pain and improved immune function. The plant is typically prepared for consumption through herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are said to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
